description: This file controls what item affixes (groups of item modifiers) are applied as the suffix for an item. These item affixes will appear at the end of the items name This file is loaded together with other similar files in the following order: MagicSuffix, magicprefix, automagic. These combined files form the Item Mods structure. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: Defines the item affix name.

columns.name: version
columns.description: Defines which game version to use this item affix (<100 = Classic mode | 100 = Expansion mode).

columns.name: spawnable
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then this item affix is used as part of the game's randomizer for assigning item modifiers when an item spawns. If equals 0, then this item affix is never used.

columns.name: rare
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then this item affix can be used when randomly assigning item modifiers when a rare item spawns. If equals 0, then this item affix is not used for rare items.

columns.name: level
columns.description: The minimum item level required for this item affix to spawn on the item. If the item level is below this value, then the item affix will not spawn on the item.

columns.name: maxlevel
columns.description: The maximum item level required for this item affix to spawn on the item. If the item level is above this value, then the item affix will not spawn on the item.

columns.name: levelreq
columns.description: The minimum character level required to equip an item that has this item affix

columns.name: classspecific
columns.description: Controls if this item affix should only be used for class specific items. This relies on the class code specified in itemtypes.Class, for the specific item.

columns.name: class
columns.description: Controls which character class is required for the class specific level requirement defined by .classlevelreq.

columns.name: classlevelreq
columns.description: The minimum character level required for a specific class in order to equip an item that has this item affix. This relies on the class specified in the .class field. If equals null, then the class will default to using the .levelreq field.

columns.name: frequency
columns.description: Controls the probability that the affix appears on the item (a higher value means that the item affix will appear on the item more often). This value gets summed together with other .frequency values from all possible item affixes that can spawn on the item, and then is used as a denominator value for the randomizer. Whichever item affix is randomly selected will be the one to appear on the item. The formula is calculated as the following: [Item Affix Selected] = [.frequency] / [Total Frequency]. If the item has a magic level (from armor.magic lvl, weapons.magic lvl, or misc.magic lvl) then the magic level value is multiplied with this value. If equals 0, then this item affix will never appear on an item.

columns.name: group
columns.description: Assigns an item affix to a specific group number. Items cannot spawn with more than 1 item affix with the same group number. This is used to guarantee that certain item affixes do not overlap on the same item. If this field is null, then the group number will default to group 0.

columns.name: mod1code
columns.description: Controls the item properties for the item affix. References a properties.code or a PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: mod1param
columns.description: The parameter value associated with the related property (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#). A number or references skills.skill, montype.type, or states.state

columns.name: mod1min
columns.description: The min value to assign to the listed related (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#).

columns.name: mod1max
columns.description: The max value to assign to the listed related (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#).

columns.name: mod2code
columns.description: Controls the item properties for the item affix. References a properties.code or a PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: mod2param
columns.description: The parameter value associated with the related property (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#). A number or references skills.skill, montype.type, or states.state

columns.name: mod2min
columns.description: The min value to assign to the listed related (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#).

columns.name: mod2max
columns.description: The max value to assign to the listed related (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#).

columns.name: mod3code
columns.description: Controls the item properties for the item affix. References a properties.code or a PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: mod3param
columns.description: The parameter value associated with the related property (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#). A number or references skills.skill, montype.type, or states.state

columns.name: mod3min
columns.description: The min value to assign to the listed related (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#).

columns.name: mod3max
columns.description: The max value to assign to the listed related (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#).

columns.name: transformcolor
columns.description: Controls the color change of the item after spawning with this item affix. If empty, then the item affix will not change the item's color.

columns.name: itype1
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are allowed to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: itype2
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are allowed to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: itype3
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are allowed to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: itype4
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are allowed to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: itype5
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are allowed to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: itype6
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are allowed to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: itype7
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are allowed to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: etype1
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are forbidden to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: etype2
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are forbidden to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: etype3
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are forbidden to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: etype4
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are forbidden to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: etype5
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are forbidden to spawn with this item affix.

columns.name: multiply
columns.description: Multiplicative modifier for the item's buy and sell costs, based on the item affix (Calculated in 1024ths for buy cost and 4096ths for sell cost).

columns.name: add
columns.description: Flat integer modification to the item's buy and sell costs, based on the item affix.
